use_cases: Immersive hero section background with cosmic nebula effect
Interactive landing page visual that responds to mouse movement
Loading screen or splash page animation with living particle system
Background element for creative portfolios or digital art showcases
Atmospheric visual layer for music or media player interfaces
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered living nebula visualization using Three.js and custom GLSL fragment shaders with fractal Brownian motion noise. The shader renders a dynamic cosmic cloud effect that warps and flows around the mouse cursor position, creating an immersive interactive background suitable for hero sections, landing pages, or ambient visual displays.
